title: Exploring Cultural Variations in Moral Judgments with Large Language Models
description: Code, model outputs, and analysis for evaluating 26 large language models against the World Values Survey (55 countries) and the PEW Global Attitudes Survey (39 countries) across 19 ethical topics, documenting a persistent W.E.I.R.D. (Western, Educated, Industrialised, Rich, Democratic) bias. Archived snapshot for the v1.0-thesis release accompanying the doctoral thesis Let Me Explain! Explainable NLP for Understanding Large Language Models (Utrecht University, 2026).
